instruction: Generate detailed L4 transmission software requirements from the given L2 and L3 requirements.

input.L2_requirement: The transmission shall switch to Eco mode when Eco mode request is active.
input.L3_requirement: The TCU shall activate Eco shift strategy when Driving_Mode_Request equals Eco.

expected_output: IF Driving_Mode_Request = Eco THEN Set_Transmission_Mode = Eco
